ddls:
CREATE TABLE "land_use_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "amazon_biome_area_ha_12_sites" REAL /* Area of the Amazon biome in hectares as measured across 12 sites */,
  "forest_area_1985_ha_12_sites" REAL /* Forest area in hectares in 1985 for 12 sites */,
  "other_area_1985_ha_12_sites" REAL /* Other land area in hectares in 1985 for 12 sites */,
  "forest_area_2017_ha_12_sites" REAL /* Forest area in hectares in 2017 for 12 sites */,
  "other_area_2017_ha_12_sites" REAL /* Other land area in hectares in 2017 for 12 sites */,
  "worker_per_ha_12_sites" REAL /* Number of workers per hectare across 12 sites */,
  "z_2017_12_sites" REAL /* Z value for 2017 across 12 sites */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the area */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the area */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type of the area */,
  "land_use_change" TEXT /* Land use change from 1985 to 2017 */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_use_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year of record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of land use data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_area_types" (
  "area_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of land area */,
  "area_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the area type (e.g., Forest, Other) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worker_metrics" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker metric record */,
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land use data ID */,
  "workers_per_hectare" REAL /* Number of workers per hectare for the corresponding land use */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_metrics_land_use_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_use_id") REFERENCES land_use_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "z_values" (
  "z_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Z value record */,
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land use data ID */,
  "z_value" REAL /* Z value associated with the land use data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year of the corresponding Z value */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the Z value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("z_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_z_values_land_use_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_use_id") REFERENCES land_use_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forest_area_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forest area metric */,
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land use data ID */,
  "forest_area_1985" REAL /* Forest area in hectares in 1985 */,
  "forest_area_2017" REAL /* Forest area in hectares in 2017 */,
  "forest_cover_loss" REAL /* Forest cover loss from 1985 to 2017 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forest_area_metrics_land_use_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_use_id") REFERENCES land_use_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_area_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each other area metric */,
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land use data ID */,
  "other_area_1985" REAL /* Other area in hectares in 1985 */,
  "other_area_2017" REAL /* Other area in hectares in 2017 */,
  "land_use_intensity" REAL /* Land use intensity from 1985 to 2017 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_area_metrics_land_use_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_use_id") REFERENCES land_use_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario analysis */,
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land use data ID */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "theta_value" REAL /* Theta value for the analysis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_analysis_land_use_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_use_id") REFERENCES land_use_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land use data ID */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_land_use_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_use_id") REFERENCES land_use_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., organization, university) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation record */,
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land use data ID */,
  "validated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was validated */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., pending, valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_land_use_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_use_id") REFERENCES land_use_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land use data ID */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source ID */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_land_use_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_use_id") REFERENCES land_use_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land use data ID */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_land_use_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_use_id") REFERENCES land_use_data ("id")
)
